meta.source: Sac County QuickFacts + coalition APIDA estimates + LNY family-fair programming
meta.enrichment_policy: Vendor tags at application are best-effort. Festival staff and engine inference fill gaps on review. Repeat vendors accumulate richer metadata each season — more data improves roster fit and public menu filters.

need_catalog.label: Halal certified
need_catalog.application_hint: Upload cert or attest whole booth is Halal-certified.

need_catalog.label: Vegetarian options
need_catalog.application_hint: Tag signature items that contain no meat or fish.

need_catalog.label: Vegan options
need_catalog.application_hint: No animal products (meat, dairy, egg, honey).

need_catalog.label: Gluten-free options
need_catalog.application_hint: Vendor best guess; festival confirms on review — not medical certification.

need_catalog.label: Dairy-free options
need_catalog.application_hint: No milk, cheese, butter in this item as served.

need_catalog.label: Nut-free
need_catalog.application_hint: No peanuts/tree nuts in this item; cross-contact possible in shared kitchens.

need_catalog.label: Mild (no hot chili)
need_catalog.application_hint: Suitable for guests avoiding hot chili — not necessarily zero spice.

need_catalog.label: Good for young children
need_catalog.application_hint: Familiar, handheld or easy to eat, mild — think ages ~3–10.

need_catalog.label: Soft / easy to chew
need_catalog.application_hint: Soups, rice plates, steamed items — helpful for seniors and dental issues.

need_catalog.label: Lower sugar / no added sugar
need_catalog.application_hint: Unsweetened drinks, sugar-free boba, savory plates without sugary glaze/sauce as served. Vendor attestation — not medical or diabetic certification. Staff confirm on review.
